# GLKit Effects Constants | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ GLKit ](/documentation/glkit)

- [ GLKit Effects Constants ](/documentation/GLKit/glkit-effects-constants)

-  GLKit Effects Constants 

API Collection# GLKit Effects Constants

## [Overview](/documentation/GLKit/glkit-effects-constants#Overview)

GLKit effects implement shaders to perform their calculations. These shaders require vertex data to be provided by your application. All of the effects provided by GLKit use a consistent set of indices to reference vertex data provided by your application. When your application enables a vertex attribute array by calling the `glEnableVertexAttribArray` function, or specifies the vertex attribute pointer by calling the `glVertexAttribPointer` function, it uses one of these constants to specify the `index` parameter.

## [Topics](/documentation/GLKit/glkit-effects-constants#topics)

### [Constants](/documentation/GLKit/glkit-effects-constants#Constants)

[`enum GLKVertexAttrib`](/documentation/glkit/glkvertexattrib)Values used as indices in OpenGL code to associate vertex data with an attribute in a named shader effect.## [See Also](/documentation/GLKit/glkit-effects-constants#see-also)

### [Rendering Effect Parameters](/documentation/GLKit/glkit-effects-constants#Rendering-Effect-Parameters)

[`class GLKEffectProperty`](/documentation/glkit/glkeffectproperty)The abstract superclass for configuration information used in GLKit rendering effects.Deprecated[`class GLKEffectPropertyFog`](/documentation/glkit/glkeffectpropertyfog)Fog drawing information for use in GLKit rendering effects.Deprecated[`class GLKEffectPropertyLight`](/documentation/glkit/glkeffectpropertylight)Lighting information for use in GLKit rendering effects.Deprecated[`class GLKEffectPropertyTexture`](/documentation/glkit/glkeffectpropertytexture)Texture drawing parameters for use in GLKit rendering effects.Deprecated[`class GLKEffectPropertyMaterial`](/documentation/glkit/glkeffectpropertymaterial)Surface appearance properties for use in GLKit rendering effects.Deprecated[`class GLKEffectPropertyTransform`](/documentation/glkit/glkeffectpropertytransform)Coordinate transform information for use in GLKit rendering effects.Deprecated
